explanations.6: The [[ ]] syntax tests if a folder doesn't exist (the ! means 'not'), and if true, it prints a colored error message then exits the script early with 'return 0'.
explanations.7: Same folder existence check as line 6, but for the comparison folder.
explanations.9: The \033[1;34m and \033[0m are escape codes that make the text print in bold blue; the %s placeholders get filled in with the four strings that follow.
explanations.11: This line does several things chained together: pushd saves your current location and goes into the source folder, LC_ALL=C makes the diff command ignore language settings for consistent output, diff compares the two folders, grep filters out lines about files that only exist in the source folder, and popd returns you to where you started.
